details.effect: [evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. You may play any number of [evolve] per turn. [fanfare] Select a Togh Keyoh card in your cemetery and put it into your EX area. It costs 2 less to play this turn.

You may play any number of [evolve] per turn. On Super-Evolve - Put a Seeds of Salvation token into your EX area. Whenever a follower on your field evolves, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.

Whenever a follower on your field evolves, deal 1 damage to each enemy leader. If it's the 1st time a follower on your field has evolved this turn, draw a card. If it's the 2nd, give this Storm. If it's the 3rd, give this [attack]+2/[defense]+2.

[fanfare] Put a Crystalia Eve token into your EX area. Once on each of your turns, when a Crystalian card is put into your EX area, draw a card. [act] [engage]: Select a Crystalia Eve in your EX area. It costs X less to play this turn. X equals the number of cards you've played this turn.
[evolve] [cost00]: Evolve this. You may play any number of [evolve] per turn. Whenever a follower on your field evolves, give your leader [defense]+1.
You may play any number of [evolve] per turn. Whenever a follower on your field evolves, give your leader [defense]+1.

You may play this from the cemetery if you've played at least 3 cards this turn. ---------- [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage. If this wasn't put onto the field from hand, put this on the bottom of your deck. During your turn, when this leaves the field, select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage.

This costs X less to play. X equals the number of faceup evolved Togh Keyoh followers in your evolve deck. ---------- Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal 5 damage to it and 1 damage to its leader.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. You may play any number of [evolve] per turn. Whenever a follower on your field evolves, select a Togh Keyoh follower on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1.

You may play any number of [evolve] per turn. On Evolve - Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 1 damage. Whenever a follower on your field evolves, select a Togh Keyoh follower on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.
On Evolve - Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put a Beast card from among them into your EX area. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
This costs X less to play. X equals the number of faceup evolved Togh Keyoh followers in your evolve deck. ---------- Select up to 2 Togh Keyoh followers in your cemetery and add them to your hand.
[evolve] [cost00]: Evolve this. Activate only if a follower on your field has evolved this turn.
On Evolve - Select a Togh Keyoh follower in your cemetery not named Verdant Law Supplicant and add it to your hand.
[fanfare] The next spell that costs 1 or less you play this turn costs 1 less. Once per turn, when you play a spell, select a follower on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and Rush.
[fanfare] Select another follower on your field and give it [attack]+1, Rush, and for the rest of this turn, "This doesn't take damage."
Strike - Give this [attack]+3/[defense]+3.
Select a [forestcraft] card on your field and an enemy follower on the field. Return the first card to its owner's hand and deal 3 damage to the second.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Search your deck for a Gigabyte Blade, summon it, then shuffle.

On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. If there are at least 3 Togh Keyoh cards on your field, deal 4 damage instead. On Super-Evolve - Put an All-Access Search token into your EX area. [act] [engage], remove 10 gigabyte counters from a Gigabyte Blade on your field: Deal 8 damage to each enemy leader.
[fanfare] Draw a card. [act] Remove 10 gigabyte counters from a Gigabyte Blade on your field: Deal 5 damage to each enemy follower on the field. Give this [attack]+2/[defense]+2 and Storm.

Rush. [fanfare] If there are at least 5 [swordcraft] followers in your cemetery, draw a card. If there are at least 10, give this Storm and your leader [defense]+2. If there are at least 15, give this Intimidate and Aura. If there are at least 20, give this [attack]+7/[defense]+7.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Ward.
Ward. On Evolve - Search your deck for up to 2 Togh Keyoh followers that cost a total of 3 or less, summon them, then shuffle.

Rush. Assail. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field. If there are at least 3 cards on its controller's field, destroy it and give this Aura and, for the rest of this turn, "This doesn't take damage."

This can't be destroyed or banished by abilities. [fanfare] Place 2 gigabyte counters on each Gigabyte Blade on your field. If there's another Gigabyte Blade on your field, bury this. Whenever a Togh Keyoh follower is put onto your field or a follower on your field evolves, place a gigabyte counter on each Gigabyte Blade on your field.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Assail. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 Togh Keyoh cards on your field, evolve this.
Assail. Strike - Place 2 gigabyte counters on each Gigabyte Blade on your field.
[fanfare] [cost03]: Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it.
Search your deck for a Shinra, All-Discerning, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle. Place 2 gigabyte counters on each Gigabyte Blade on your field.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] If there are at least 3 Togh Keyoh cards on your field, give your leader [defense]+2.
On Evolve - Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Togh Keyoh card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Summon 2 Knight tokens. Strike - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of followers on your field.
On Evolve/Strike - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of followers on your field.
[fanfare] Search your deck for a 1-cost follower, put it into your EX area, then shuffle.
Ward. [fanfare] [cost02]: Give this [attack]+2/[defense]+2. Draw a card.

[fanfare] Search your deck for a Luminous Commander, Luminous Magus, and Luminous Lancetrooper, reveal them, add them to your hand, then shuffle. [act] [engage], bury this: Select a Commander follower on your field and give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Select a card in your banished zone. Add it to your hand, then banish a card from your hand.
On Evolve - Banish another follower from your field: Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it and draw a card. On Super-Evolve - Put an Adorn with Jewels token into your EX area.

[fanfare] Draw a card. Banish a card from your hand. [act] [engage]: Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. Activate only if there are at least 10 cards in your banished zone. [lastwords] Banish this.
This costs X less to play. X equals the number of cards in your banished zone. ---------- [fanfare] Put a Ginger's Curse token into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Draw 3 cards. Banish 2 cards from your hand.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it damage equal to the number of cards in your banished zone.
Rush. Drain. [fanfare] Banish the top 2 cards of your deck. Then, if there are at least 5 cards in your banished zone, give this Assail. If there are at least 10, give this [attack]+1/[defense]+1.
Choose 1. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field and, if there are at least 10 cards in your banished zone, deal 2 damage to it and its leader. (2) Draw a card. Banish the top card of your deck.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Banish the top card of your deck. Then, if there are at least 10 cards in your banished zone, give your leader [defense]+2.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.
[fanfare]/[lastwords] Draw a card. Bury the top card of your deck.

Choose 1. (1) Select an enemy follower on the field. Destroy it and banish the top 2 cards of your deck. (2) [cost01]: Select up to 2 followers in your banished zone with different names that cost 2 or less and summon them.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Banish the top card of your deck.
Storm. Strike - Give this [attack]+1/[defense]+1 for every 5 cards in your banished zone.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [lastwords] Bury the top card of your deck.
On Evolve - Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal an Academic card from among them and add it to your hand. Bury the rest. [lastwords] Bury the top card of your deck.
[fanfare] You may summon a non-[runecraft] follower that costs 6 or less from your hand and give it Rush, Assail, and "At the start of your end phase, return this to its owner's hand."
This costs 1 less to play for every 5 spells in your cemetery. ---------- Select a Mage follower on your field and give it [attack]+2/[defense]+2.
[act] [cost01], bury this from your EX area: Deal 1 damage to each enemy follower on the field. ---------- [quick] Draw a card. If this was played from hand, put it into your EX area.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this.

On Evolve - Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put a Draconic Duelist card from among them into your EX area. It costs 3 less to play this turn. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. On Super-Evolve - Put a Youthful Strike token into your EX area.

Whenever a Draconic Duelist follower with at least 4 attack on your field attacks, select an enemy follower on the field and deal 1 damage to it and its leader. [fanfare] Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Draconic Duelist card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.
Ward. If an enemy follower would be put from the field into the cemetery, banish it instead. [fanfare] Deal 8 damage to each enemy follower on the field. Deal 4 damage to each enemy leader.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Whenever a Draconic Duelist follower with at least 4 attack on your field attacks, give your leader [defense]+1.

On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. If there's a Draconic Duelist follower on your field with at least 4 attack, deal 3 damage instead. Whenever a Draconic Duelist follower with at least 4 attack on your field attacks, give your leader [defense]+1.

Ward. [fanfare] Select up to 2 cards in your cemetery named Prophetic Dragon and summon them. At the start of your end phase, select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 5 damage and give your leader [defense]+1. [act] [cost02], discard this: Draw a card.
Search your deck for up to 3 Togh Keyoh followers with different names that cost 3 or less, summon them, then shuffle. Give your leader [defense]+2.

[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Select another Draconic Duelist follower on your field and give it [attack]+1. Whenever a Draconic Duelist follower with at least 4 attack on your field attacks, give it [attack]+1.

On Evolve - Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Draconic Duelist card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. Whenever a Draconic Duelist follower with at least 4 attack on your field attacks, give it [attack]+1.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. Ward. [fanfare] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 5 damage.
Ward. On Evolve - Summon an Adelle, Jealous Dragon token.

[fanfare] Look at the top 2 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Draconic Duelist card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. [act] [engage], bury this: Give your leader [defense]+1. Activate only if there's a Draconic Duelist follower on your field with at least 4 attack.
[evolve] [cost03]: Evolve this. While there's another Draconic Duelist follower on your field, this has Rush and Assail. At the start of your end phase, return this to its owner's hand.
While there's another Draconic Duelist follower on your field, this has Assail. At the start of your end phase, return this to its owner's hand.
Rush. [fanfare] If Overflow is active for you, give this [attack]+2/[defense]+2. Whenever this takes damage, if it's on your field, search your deck for a Serpent Drake, summon it, then shuffle.
Ward. [fanfare] Summon a Hellflame Dragon or Dragon token. [act] [cost02], [engage]: Summon a Hellflame Dragon or Dragon token.
This doesn't take ability damage.
[quick] Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. If there are at least 5 Marine cards in your cemetery, deal 4 damage instead.

On Evolve - Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may put an [abysscraft] card that costs 2 or less or Togh Keyoh card that costs 2 or less from among them into your EX area. It costs 2 less to play this turn. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. On Super-Evolve - Put a Diurnal Slumber token into your EX area.

[fanfare] You may discard a 2-cost card. If you do, draw a card. If you don't, bury this. [act] [cost00]: Select an enemy leader or enemy follower on the field and deal it 3 damage. Activate only if there are at least ten 2-cost cards in your cemetery, and only once per turn.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Discard a Vampire card: Put a Forest Bat token into your EX area. Draw a card.
On Evolve - Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. On Super-Evolve - Give this "Each Forest Bat on your field has Storm and Bane."
[evolve] [cost05]: Evolve this. [act] [engage], reveal two 2-cost cards from your hand: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.
Storm. On Evolve - Refresh this. [act] [engage], reveal two 2-cost cards from your hand: Select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 4 damage.

[fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Vampire card from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. If you revealed a follower with "Vania" in its name, summon a Forest Bat token. [act] [cost00]: Give each Forest Bat on your field [attack]+1/[defense]+1. Activate only if there are at least 5 Vampire cards in your cemetery, and only once per turn.
Select a 2-cost Togh Keyoh follower in your cemetery and summon it.
[evolve] [cost01]: Evolve this. [fanfare] Reveal two 2-cost cards from your hand: Give your leader [defense]+2.

Deal 1 damage to each enemy leader and enemy follower on the field. If there are at least ten 2-cost cards in your cemetery, deal 2 damage instead.
[fanfare] Discard a Vampire card: Draw a card. [act] [engage], bury this: Summon a Forest Bat token. If there's a follower on your field with "Queen Vampire" in its name, summon 3 instead.

[fanfare]/[lastwords] Select a follower in your cemetery that costs 1 or less and summon it.
Whenever a follower is put from the field into the cemetery, give this [attack]+1. [fanfare] [cost03]: Select an enemy follower on the field and destroy it.

Look at the top card of your deck. If it's a Vampire card, you may reveal it and add it to your hand. Summon a Forest Bat token. If there are at least 5 Vampire cards in your cemetery, give it [attack]+2, Rush, and Assail.

On Evolve - You may summon a Togh Keyoh follower that costs 3 or less or [havencraft] amulet that costs 3 or less from your hand. On Super-Evolve - Put a Righteous Conviction token into your EX area. Whenever your leader gains [defense], select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage.

Whenever your leader gains [defense], select an enemy follower on the field and deal it 2 damage. [act] [cost00]: Deal damage to each enemy leader equal to the number of Togh Keyoh followers on your field. Give your leader [defense]+1. Activate only once per turn.

Ward. [fanfare] Search your deck for an Elana's Prayer, reveal it, add it to your hand, then shuffle. At the start of each opponent's main phase, if there's an Elana's Prayer on your field, give your leader [defense]+2.

Bane. [fanfare] Each player summons a Totem of Madness token.

Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. The next Togh Keyoh card you play this turn costs 2 less. [act] [cost01], [engage], bury this: Give your leader [defense]+1.

Ward. [fanfare] If there's another follower on your field with Ward, give this [defense]+1.

On Evolve - Choose 1. (1) Select an A-Class Pyromancy in your cemetery and put it into your EX area. It costs 1 less to play this turn. (2) Give your leader [defense]+1. Bury the top card of your deck. (3) Banish a card from your hand: Draw a card.
[quick] As an additional cost to play this, discard a Togh Keyoh card. ---------- Select an enemy follower on the field. Deal it 4 damage, give your leader [defense]+1, and draw a card.

[fanfare] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may reveal a Togh Keyoh card not named Togh Keyoh, Neometropolis from among them and add it to your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order. [act] [cost01], [engage], banish this: Select a Togh Keyoh follower on your field. Give it [attack]+1/[defense]+1 and your leader [defense]+1.

Place 3 gigabyte counters on each Gigabyte Blade on your field. Draw 2 cards.
For the rest of this turn, you may play cards from your banished zone.
Select an enemy follower on the field. It loses all abilities. Change its attack and defense to 1.
Select an enemy follower on the field and a Togh Keyoh follower on your field. Destroy the first follower and give the second Storm.

At the start of your end phase, place a curse counter on this. Then, if this has 1 curse counter, deal 1 damage to your leader. If it has 2, discard a card. If it has 3, discard a card, deal 3 damage to your leader, and bury this.
